title: InterPoll Poll (v1)
description: Rich, replicated Poll object as written/read by pollService.ts. Normative companion to IPP-03. Note the wire encoding of PollOption.voters as an object map (see definitions.pollOption).

authorId.description: Currently the deviceId; see IPP-01 identity migration.

totalVotes.description: Client-recomputed counter (read-modify-write, not a CRDT). See IPP-03.

authorPubkey.description: Schnorr x-only pubkey (hex) of the signer.

contentSignature.description: Schnorr signature. NOTE: poll signing currently uses an inline non-canonical serialization, not IPP-02 canonicalJSON — see IPP-03 Current Implementation Note.

relayConfirmed.description: Client-side: relay independently confirmed persistence via /db/soul.

voters.description: In the application model this is string[]; on the Gun wire it is encoded as an index-keyed object map (numeric-string key -> voterId) because Gun cannot store sparse arrays. Both encodings are shown.
